---
title: "test_stability.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_stability.py"
loc: 48
complexity: 4
logic_score: 3.85
style_score: 3.71
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.44
---

## Intent
The `test_stability.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_gungnir_validator_stable, test_gungnir_validator_flaky, test_gungnir_validator_continue, mock_watcher, test_watcher_load_save_state, test_watcher_is_locked, test_watcher_cooldown, test_watcher_record_edit_fatigue, test_watcher_echo_detection. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_gungnir_validator_stable, test_gungnir_validator_flaky, test_gungnir_validator_continue, mock_watcher, test_watcher_load_save_state, test_watcher_is_locked, test_watcher_cooldown, test_watcher_record_edit_fatigue, test_watcher_echo_detection. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 10 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [time](file://time)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.sentinel.stability](file://src.sentinel.stability)

### Exports
- `test_gungnir_validator_stable`
- `test_gungnir_validator_flaky`
- `test_gungnir_validator_continue`
- `mock_watcher`
- `test_watcher_load_save_state`
- `test_watcher_is_locked`
- `test_watcher_cooldown`
- `test_watcher_record_edit_fatigue`
- `test_watcher_echo_detection`
